name: Rheine
_note: Template — copy to config/observer.json and edit. elevationM is the observer height above WGS84 ellipsoid (a local MSL value is fine within ~50 m). geoidUndulationM is EGM2008 N at the observer location, used to convert ADS-B alt_baro (≈MSL) to HAE before geometric comparison; ~+46 m at Rheine, look it up at https://www.unavco.org/software/geodetic-utilities/geoid-height-calculator/ for your site.
